notes: Services in this file are end-to-end usable today: probe-catalog parsed_ok with a Solana-USDC leg AND the response shape is deliverable to Telegram/Discord (text/JSON, not binary). Of the 72 upstream pay.sh services: 9 are listed here (supported), 1 (paysponge/screenshotone) parsed_ok but returns binary and is in unsupported.json under requires_binary_response, 41 reject at the parser (mpp_protocol / siwx_auth_required / invalid_demand) and are in unsupported.json, 21 don't return 402 (broken/moved). See SKILL.md for the read flow and tests/paysh/catalog-summary.md for the full probe matrix.

services.name: Wolfram Alpha
services.summary: Computational intelligence — math, science, factual lookups via the Wolfram knowledge engine.

services.name: Tripadvisor Nearby Search
services.summary: Search nearby travel locations — hotels, restaurants, attractions — by latitude/longitude.

services.name: 2Captcha
intents: solve captcha on my own site
accessibility captcha helper for users with disabilities
captcha during testing of a site I own or have operator permission to automate
services.summary: Submit a CAPTCHA for solving — supports recaptcha, hcaptcha, image. Authorized use only: (1) accessibility assistance for users with disabilities completing a CAPTCHA on a site they're legitimately using, or (2) automated testing of a site the user OWNS or has direct site-operator permission to automate. The user's own consent does NOT make solving a CAPTCHA on a third-party site authorized — the SITE OPERATOR's consent is what matters. NOT for defeating anti-abuse controls.

services.name: Reducto Document Parser
services.summary: Parse documents (PDF, images) into structured data via Reducto's AI extraction.

services.name: Rentcast Markets
services.summary: US rental market data — average rent, market trends, property statistics by zip/city.

services.name: Crushrewards Shopper
services.summary: Find best price across major US retailers (Amazon, Walmart, Costco, Home Depot, etc.).

services.name: StableCrypto New Pools
services.summary: Get new on-chain pools across DEXes via the CoinGecko-onchain proxy. Returns recently-deployed token pairs — NOT generic price lookups.

services.name: StableEnrich Data Enrichment
services.summary: Enrich emails, domains, or names into person/company profiles (LinkedIn-style data).

services.name: Purch Marketplace Search
services.summary: Search the Purch marketplace catalog (general product/listing search).
